signal_evidence.capex_direction: We are making a really big step up in marketing, about $100 million year-over-year is our plan to spend in marketing versus last year.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: Gold subscribers had 8 times the assets with an average of over $40,000, grew net deposits roughly twice as fast, and had 5 times the retirement account adoption... Gold ARPU is also multiples of our average customer.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: We've already brought in more net deposits year-to-date than the $17 billion we did in all of 2023, with most of the year still in front of us.
